blocks.text: Two 2-0 deficits, one night: Champions League miracle time
UEFA threw out Barcelona's first-leg appeal — no help from above tonight. Liverpool have Anfield's roar; Barcelona have only hope at the Metropolitano. Two miracles, same evening.
🎮 IEM Rio live — rain (Håvard Nygaard) hunting CS2 Major glory in São Paulo
⚽ Sun 17:30 — Arsenal at the Etihad, 6pts clear, this match defines the PL title race
